subcodes.first_line: Verily, We make mention of the people of the verdant realm who turned towards the Most Exalted Horizon when they shattered the idols of desire in the name of their Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر اهل الخضرآء الذین اقبلوا الی الافق الاعلی اذ کسروا اصنام الهوی باسم ربهم
subcodes.subjects: @Satan; the Evil One, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @unity; oneness of humanity, @idolatry
